name: advisor
description: Run your session on Claude's most capable model as a full-time architect while Grok and Codex handle implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Architect-led orchestration across Claude, Grok, and Codex.
interface.longDescription: Advisor turns the primary session into an architect that owns requirements, specifications, delegation, and verification while routing implementation work to specialized model lanes.
defaultPrompt: Route this implementation through the advisor workflow.
Create an implementation spec and delegate the coding.
Review the implementation against the original requirements.
